title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: Tampa is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.26. This anomaly has severe implications for the city.
body:
The heat wave has resulted in a high CDD of 10.4 GG, indicating extreme heat stress.
The humidity level is at 50%, and the wind speed is 10.9 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
